description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a short-sleeve t-shirt, cropped jeans, and flip-flop sandals. He wears a backward baseball cap and a face mask, with dark arm sleeves covering both arms. A tactical-style chest harness or vest is strapped over his shirt, adding a utilitarian element to his appearance. The figure's posture is relaxed and upright, with arms hanging naturally by his sides. His face is partially obscured by the mask and sunglasses, giving him a modern, streetwise look suitable for city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with a chest harness, face mask, and backward cap, wearing a t-shirt, cropped jeans, and flip-flops. His look is urban and practical, with dark arm sleeves and sunglasses.
description_view_0: Front view shows the chest harness, face mask, sunglasses, and full details of the t-shirt and arm sleeves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, mask, and the harness straps, as well as the cropped jeans and flip-flops.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cap, harness straps, and the fit of the jeans, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the harness profile, arm sleeve, and the side of the cap and mask.
attribute_clothing_type: casual t-shirt and cropped jeans with tactical chest harness, arm sleeves, and face mask
